prompt: Dry run only: draft the Jira ticket you would create for the current branch changes. Inspect the repository context, infer the issue type, and show the TWG workflow, but do not mutate Jira.
assertions: The response explicitly respects the dry-run instruction and does not create or update a Jira issue.
The proposed work item targets project OB, is assigned to me, and resolves the active sprint dynamically.
The ticket content is grounded in inspected current changes rather than invented details.
The description is structured Markdown and the workflow avoids passing Markdown through an HTML-default description input.
